MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Antonia Russell, appearing in Propria Persona. Notice having been given and there being no objection by appearing party nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. (212)

Ntc Of Mtn For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar May-21-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ANTONIA RUSSELL'S MOTION For Entry Of Judgment against Defendant Miriam Miranda Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulated Settlement. NOTWITHSTANDING THE UNTIMELY OPPOSITION, THE MOTION IS DENIED BECAUSE THE RELIEF REQUESTED IS NOT WITHIN THE TERMS OF THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND THEREFORE IS NOT AVAILABLE UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 664.6. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)
